meaning: n.刀口,利刃,锋,优势,边缘,优势,尖锐vt.使锋利,挤进,镶边,开刃vi.缓缓移动,侧着移动
examples: I sat down at the water's edge.
Be careful—it has a sharp edge.
He didn't dare look over the edge.
After adjustment for risk the active funds' edge grows to 1.3 points a year.
The brand new W hotel Paris-Opera is on the leading edge of edgy in Paris.
